What Sound Does A ___ Make?

The Car Crash Trick
This is getting creators 160x their channel avg
The Car Crash Trick
This is getting creators 160x their channel avg
  • This creates instant stakes at the highest possible level (death) -> earns the view
  • The quick cuts and angle changes with the same problem (car coming at them) -> earns retention
  • The main takeaway is how important stakes are to stopping the scroll
  • Similar to our Lowe’s Plane format - maybe inspo for branded?

4th of July Sounds Dominated

Moon Media
3 weeks in a row top trending games creator on TT
Moon Media
3 weeks in a row top trending games creator on TT
  • Had the 2nd most viewed TT this week in entertainment niche
  • Their stump format continues to be an outlier performer
  • The weird visual of the stump earns the view
  • Seeing who can do it in the least swings + the satisfaction of the nail in the stump earns retention

Trial Reel Testing
Trial Reel Testing
  • Not a trending creator but a content type big creators are testing in a transparent way
  • Following and shouting out viewers is a positive brand play
  • Creators are even saying it’s a Trial Reel (see additional link) and calling out people for not following yet - this is a beneficial method on YT to drive subs

Trending sounds and creators are driven by tentpole moments more than formats are -> World Cup and 4th of July
Identify and plan content around future events

Text on screen or simple actions that stop the scroll

61m views (60x channel avg)
Hot Spoon vs XXX
61m views (60x channel avg)

Samuel Dabo
Only creator with 2 Top 10 trending TTs this week
Samuel Dabo
Only creator with 2 Top 10 trending TTs this week
  • #12 trending TT creator in all niches worldwide
  • Added 750k of his 2.6m followers this week
  • He looks like a wholesome kid, but he’s 27
  • He’s Ghanaian, who are likely to be out the World Cup by July 4th, but his top performing videos are meeting non Ghanaian players so the collab potential is still there

14th most-viewed TT this week
Nikolas Wild
14th most-viewed TT this week
  • Payoff is so good so it earns checking out his other videos
  • “Is it real?” factor = shareability = virality
  • Genuine reactions = relatability = virality

Redbull
19m views (6x channel avg)
Redbull
19m views (6x channel avg)
  • Strong format: 6 videos in 1. Similar format to $1 vs $1,000,000 XXX
  • First frame earns the view with high stakes

1
Viral trending content is understood by a universal audience
Non-verbal/minimal words widen the potential audience. Show, don’t tell
2
The World Cup is obviously continuing to dominate at video and creator level
Content planning around global tentpoles is a must. Shoutout the original content and creator collabs we have in the works!
3
Videos that toe the line of real vs fake are winning across niches
Magic, AI, clever edits all show up in top trending content. It stands out from the saturated space and generates engagement. What’s our version?

TikTok profile
1
Overperforming content shares three patterns
Easy-to-understand first frame. A person's face or POV angle. Clear stakes — Red Bull's skydiving tic tac toe nails all three.
2
Trends rely on repeatability
Europeans trying American food and Guess the Weight are both low-lift and repeatable. The format does the heavy lifting; the content just needs a fresh angle.
3
Game-format creators lead with speed, not explanation
They don't explain the game — they get straight into it. Understood visually and without sound.
